summary: Tested Gallery UX Tickets (TICKET-001 through TICKET-008). All backend endpoints pass validation tests. Frontend components are properly implemented and integrated. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: All Gallery UX components (PriceSourceBadge, QualityTierBadge, BulkPurchaseBar, DownloadVisibility, CrewPaymentProgress, QualityComparisonModal) are well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Components properly use environment variables for API URLs
Multi-select mode in SurferGallery is properly integrated with BulkPurchaseBar
PhotoSelectionQueue countdown timer is functional with live updates
CrewPaymentProgress is integrated in OnDemandTab for crew sessions
test_credentials: No test credentials file found at /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Users found: david@pritzker.net (davidsurf), testy@test.com (davidpro), dpritzker0905@gmail.com (davidpritzker)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery UX tickets (TICKET-001 to TICKET-008) have been implemented and tested. Backend endpoints for cover-remaining, remind-crew, bulk-purchase, and quality-previews are working. Frontend components are properly integrated. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_gallery_ux_tickets_iter287.py for regression testing.
